---
title: "Nicolaj"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-30"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(worldfootballR)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
```





```{r}
# This loads from a static file, much more reliable. This here is the main dataset
epl_shots <- load_understat_league_shots(league = "EPL")

glimpse(epl_shots)
colnames(epl_shots)
```

```{r}
view(epl_shots)
```




```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# ── Step 1: Filter to 2016 onwards ────────────────────────────

epl_shots_filtered <- epl_shots %>%
  filter(season >= 2016)

# Quick check
epl_shots_filtered %>% count(season)

# ── Step 2: Aggregate to match level ──────────────────────────
# Keep match-level columns, sum xG per home/away team
# Remove all shot-specific columns (minute, X, Y, player, etc.)

match_xg <- epl_shots_filtered %>%
  group_by(match_id, league, season, date, home_team, away_team, home_goals, away_goals) %>%
  summarise(
    home_xG = sum(xG[h_a == "h"], na.rm = TRUE),
    away_xG = sum(xG[h_a == "a"], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(date)

# Quick check
glimpse(match_xg)
head(match_xg,10)

# How many matches per season?
match_xg %>% count(season)
```



```{r}
view(match_xg)
```







Til senere MÅSKE ALT UDNER



```{r}
fbref_seasons <- 2018:2025

# ── 1. Defense stats ───────────────────────────────────────────

defense_stats <- map_dfr(fbref_seasons, function(yr) {
  message("Pulling defense stats: ", yr)
  Sys.sleep(3)
  tryCatch({
    load_fb_big5_advanced_season_stats(
      season_end_year = yr,
      stat_type       = "defense",
      team_or_player  = "team"
    ) %>%
      filter(Comp == "Premier League") %>%
      mutate(season_end = yr)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("  Failed for: ", yr, " — ", e$message)
    NULL
  })
})

saveRDS(defense_stats, "epl_defense_stats.rds")
message("Saved: epl_defense_stats.rds — ", nrow(defense_stats), " rows")

# ── 2. Keeper stats ────────────────────────────────────────────

keeper_stats <- map_dfr(fbref_seasons, function(yr) {
  message("Pulling keeper stats: ", yr)
  Sys.sleep(3)
  tryCatch({
    load_fb_big5_advanced_season_stats(
      season_end_year = yr,
      stat_type       = "keepers_adv",
      team_or_player  = "player"
    ) %>%
      filter(Comp == "Premier League") %>%
      mutate(season_end = yr)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("  Failed for: ", yr, " — ", e$message)
    NULL
  })
})

saveRDS(keeper_stats, "epl_keeper_stats.rds")
message("Saved: epl_keeper_stats.rds — ", nrow(keeper_stats), " rows")

# ── Quick check ────────────────────────────────────────────────
glimpse(defense_stats)
glimpse(keeper_stats)
```
```{r}
view(defense_stats)
view(keeper_stats)
```

```{r}
# Check earliest and latest season in shots data
epl_shots %>% count(season) %>% print(n = 30)
```
